title: M@thuwshelach #4968
definition:
Methuselah = "man of the dart"

 1) son of Enoch, 6th in descent from Seth, and father of Lamech
nasbUsage:
Definition: Methuselah = "man of the dart"

 1) son of Enoch, 6th in descent from Seth, and father of Lamech

    NASB:  perh. man of the dart, a desc. of Seth
